context: Tests whether the agent implements the Zustand cart store with the persist middleware, correct CartItem interface fields, the expected localStorage key, and all required store operations including quantity merging.

checklist.name: persist middleware imported
checklist.description: lib/cart-store.ts imports 'persist' from 'zustand/middleware' (not from another package)

checklist.name: persist middleware used
checklist.description: The store is wrapped with persist() middleware rather than managing localStorage manually

checklist.name: Storage key name
checklist.description: The persist configuration uses name: 'cart-storage' as the localStorage key

checklist.name: variantId field
checklist.description: The CartItem type/interface includes a 'variantId' field (string)

checklist.name: price and quantity fields
checklist.description: The CartItem type/interface includes both 'price' (number) and 'quantity' (number) fields

checklist.name: title and image fields
checklist.description: The CartItem type/interface includes both 'title' (string) and 'image' (string) fields

checklist.name: addItem merges quantity
checklist.description: addItem checks for an existing item with the same variantId and increments quantity rather than adding a duplicate entry

checklist.name: total() computed
checklist.description: The store includes a total() function that computes the sum of price * quantity across all items

checklist.name: removeItem and clearCart
checklist.description: The store includes both a removeItem(variantId) operation and a clearCart() operation

checklist.name: updateQuantity operation
checklist.description: The store includes an updateQuantity(variantId, quantity) operation
